name: No-Bake Fresh Fruit Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese, orange rind, orange juice, and sugar together until fluffy.
2. Fill pie crust or tart shells with the cheese mixture.
3. Chill thoroughly.
4. Top with fresh fruit.
5. Add 1 tablespoon lemon juice to peaches or nectarines to prevent discoloration.
6. Sprinkle additional sugar generously over the fruit.
